reasoning:
The rating on 2025-11-23 is confirmed via Wikipedia to be 2769. A 1% increase means Arjun must reach at least 2796.69, a formidable gain of ~28 Elo points. 
1. 2025-11-30: FIDE rankings update on the 1st of the month, meaning Wikipedia will almost certainly still show the November 1 ratings (2769) on Nov 30. Probability reflects absolute minimum boundary: 0.05.
2. 2025-12-23: The December FIDE list will apply. Arjun is playing the World Cup in Nov 2025. With only up to 14 classical games available and a K-factor of 10, scoring +2.8 Expected Points (+28 Elo) in one month is nearly impossible, especially given the prevalence of draws in World Cup chess. Probability: 0.08.
3. 2026-02-21: The Feb 2026 rating list will apply, encompassing the World Cup and likely January super-tournaments like Tata Steel. Gaining 28 points over 3 months is still difficult but viable, especially since Arjun peaked above 2800 in 2024 and is fully capable of going on a massive streak. Probability: 0.15.
